title: Add session-based capture adapter boundary for Atlas handoff
description: Define how Sentinel receives Atlas-produced session captures and any related metadata instead of assuming direct flat-flow capture ownership.
acceptanceCriteria: Sentinel's capture boundary can consume session-oriented Atlas artifacts and metadata honestly
The contract does not assume Sentinel itself must navigate the app to remain useful
Legacy direct-capture behavior remains understood and documented during migration
Fixtures show how Atlas-produced captures are indexed for later validation
proofRequirements: adapter or fixture examples exist for session-based artifacts
nonGoals: implementing full session orchestration in Sentinel

notes.text: Execution started for the session-based Atlas capture handoff boundary. This slice defines how Sentinel consumes Atlas session artifact indexes without assuming Sentinel navigated the app itself.

Completed the Atlas session capture handoff boundary with explicit session-index types, validation, structured artifact-path rules, and example fixtures showing how Atlas-produced captures are indexed for Sentinel validation.
